title: Casha
content:
A child-like fawn
        moistened nudging &
        joyous breath,
        an allowance for leave
        as her gentle hand
        budges my sibling cupping.

        And walking in a field of gardens
         - our Jardin des Plantes - 
        a molecule in depth
        flowery pennons
        near Picardy wet.

        Casha tendrils here pinion the eye,
        little Annabel Lee
        with the sunshine wet in her parting hand
        that all the birds in grace sigh
        at Saint Francis breathless.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Paul Cameron Brown delivers a powerful performance in "Casha"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
